title: ESMA Adds 14 New CASPs to MiCA Register as Licensing Slows
summary: ESMA adds 14 CASPs to its MiCA register, with banks and Ripple Payments Europe among the new entries as total providers reach 294.

title: Bitcoin bottom countdown nears 50 days after BTC supply in loss passed 50%
summary: Bitcoin supply in loss hit 50% nearly 50 days ago, mimicking the countdown to BTC price bear-market bottoms.

title: Wheat Fluctuates as Traders Weigh Black Sea Risks, US Exports
summary: Wheat fluctuated after hitting a two-year high in the previous session as traders weighed Black Sea supply risks against weak US export data.

title: UBS AM’s Zhao Sours on Treasuries as US Growth Beats Europe
summary: UBS Asset Management’s Kevin Zhao is planning to short Treasuries in a bet that the robust US economy will erode the haven appeal of owning government debt.
